title: Marketing site feature structure is simplified
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Marketing site feature navigation
  Scenario: Top navigation is simplified
    Given I open the marketing site
    Then the top navigation shows Philosophy, Features, and Getting Started
    And it does not show Jira Sync or Local Tasks

  Scenario: Features list page links to feature pages
    Given I open /features
    Then I see links for Jira Sync and Local Tasks

  Scenario: Homepage exposes feature links
    Given I open the homepage
    Then I see a Features section
    And it links to Jira Sync and Local Tasks

  Scenario: Footer groups features and reference
    Given I scroll to the footer
    Then I see a Features section with Jira Sync and Local Tasks
    And I see a Reference section with Architecture and Documentation
